sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11785" key="a)pe/kdusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπέκ-δῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n11785.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">putting off</tr_> (likeclothes), ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg012.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
